_provenance: Claude-authored original Gaokao 完形填空 (narrative + reflection). Each passage ~220-260 words, 15 blanks, 4 same-part-of-speech options per blank, exactly one correct by context/logic/collocation. DeepSeek not used. answer letters resolve to option index.

sets.passage: Two years ago, I moved to a new city where I knew no one. The first weeks were (1)___. Every evening I walked home alone, feeling that I did not (2)___ anywhere. After that, I greeted him every day, and our short chats slowly became the (6)___ part of my evening. The strange city began to feel less (7)___. Months later he fell ill and his corner stood (8)___. I realised how much our small friendship had (9)___ to me. When he returned, thinner but smiling, I felt a joy that (10)___ me. That experience taught me something (11)___: in a world of strangers, a single friendly (12)___ can change everything. We often wait for others to reach out (13)___, but kindness usually begins with one (14)___ person. sets.passage: Mei had always been the top student in her class, so when she failed an important exam, the shock was (1)___. For days she could hardly speak, certain that her future was (2)___.
